title: Founder's Associate, Growth & Operations
requirements_met: Work directly with founders across functions: 1 yr Founder's Associate at Minima + 6 yrs founder-facing
Comfort with ambiguity / entrepreneurial operator: brought structure to early-stage chaos at Minima
Funnel analytics / investigate churn & drop-off: GA, failure analysis at Amazon Alexa, metric dashboards
Sales enablement & onboarding optimisation: GTM and community-led presale ($4.5m, 15x ROI)
Cross-functional execution across growth & ops: ran multiple workstreams seed-to-Series-A
gaps: Salary range bottom (£33k) below £50k floor — only top of band reaches floor; negotiation needed
No formal management consulting background (listed as preferred)
Wing's AI/automation positioning is assistant-services led, not a core AI-agent product company

required_skills.calculation: 40 * (5/5) = 40 — founder-facing, ambiguity, funnel analytics, sales enablement/onboarding, cross-functional ops all matched

preferred_skills.calculation: 20 * (3/4) = 15 — startup yes, SQL yes, design partial; consulting no

experience_fit.calculation: Founder's Associate role; Ryan held this exact title at Minima — ideal fit

industry_match.calculation: AI/automation managed-assistant company — AI-adjacent, not core AI-agent product

salary_penalty.reason: Stated range £33k-£55k; bottom is below £50k minimum — penalty applied per rubric

benefits: Path to leading growth/revops or running a business unit
notes: Wing Assistant: managed-assistant / AI-automation company. Founder's Associate, Growth & Operations works directly with founders on churn, onboarding, funnel analytics, recruitment ops. London. Net-new — not in any dedup list (distinct from Wing Assistant's other Lever 'Product & Growth Associate'). Salary penalty applied; top of band reaches £50k floor on negotiation.

must_haves.req: Entrepreneurial operator working directly with founding team; think like a founder
must_haves.note: Founder's Associate at Minima — held this exact title and operated founder-facing seed-to-Series-A

must_haves.req: Analytical & structured — spot patterns in funnel data, turn into solutions
must_haves.note: Growth/lifecycle analytics (segmentation, A/B testing, conversions) + Alexa error-analysis; less classic sales-funnel/RevOps analytics, no SQL evidence

must_haves.req: Hands-on builder — personally create sales collateral, decks, onboarding guides, playbooks
must_haves.note: Built content engine, presale collateral, ambassador/onboarding programmes from scratch

must_haves.req: Communicative — join/lead client calls, executive presence
Tool-savvy with productivity/CRM tools (HubSpot, Notion, Asana etc.)
must_haves.note: Marketing/lifecycle tooling and Notion-style ops implied; specific CRM stack not evidenced

met_strengths: Exact 'Founder's Associate' title and founder-facing operating history
No degree/domain/visa gates; London role, UK-authorized
Builder-of-collateral + GTM enablement overlaps the role's core mandate
Preferred consulting/SQL are nice-to-haves, not blockers
interview_match.one_line_verdict: No hard gates and a literal title match; main risk is the sales-enablement/RevOps-funnel emphasis and £33-55k band sitting at/below his £50k floor — a realistic interview shot.
